zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud de Penthièvre於大約1088年出生在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉雷斯時，她的父親Etienne de Penthièvre Count of Treguier, 3rd Lord of Richmond24歲，母親Hawise Guincamp Countess of Guingamp25歲。她於1110年之前與Walter De Gaunt Earl of Lincoln在英國林可爾史爾結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1135年4月21日在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利盧享年48歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾巴德尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maud de Penthièvre于大约1088年出生在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉雷斯时，她的父亲Etienne de Penthièvre Count of Treguier, 3rd Lord of Richmond24岁，母亲Hawise Guincamp Countess of Guingamp25岁。她于1110年之前与Walter De Gaunt Earl of Lincoln在英国林可爾史爾结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1135年4月21日在法国豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利盧享年48岁，埋葬在英国英格兰林可爾史爾巴德尼。

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud de Penthièvre was born about 1088, in Rennes, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France, her father, Etienne de Penthièvre Count of Treguier, 3rd Lord of Richmond, was 24 and her mother, Hawise Guincamp Countess of Guingamp, was 25. She married Walter De Gaunt Earl of Lincoln before 1110, in Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 21 April 1135, in Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France, at the age of 48, and was buried in Bardney, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud de Penthièvre est née environ 1088, à Rennes, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, son père, Etienne de Penthièvre Count of Treguier, 3rd Lord of Richmond, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Hawise Guincamp Countess of Guingamp, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Walter De Gaunt Earl of Lincoln avant 1110, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 21 avril 1135, à Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterrée à Bardney, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maud de Penthièvre um 1088 in Rennes, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Etienne de Penthièvre Count of Treguier, 3rd Lord of Richmond 24 und ihre Mutter Hawise Guincamp Countess of Guingamp 25. Sie hat vor 1110 in Lincolnshire, England Walter De Gaunt Earl of Lincoln geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 21. April 1135 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Bardney, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maud de Penthièvre è nata il circa 1088 nel Rennes, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, sua padre, Etienne de Penthièvre Count of Treguier, 3rd Lord of Richmond, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Hawise Guincamp Countess of Guingamp, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Walter De Gaunt Earl of Lincoln prima del 1110, nel Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 21 aprile 1135, nel Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolta a Bardney, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Maud de Penthièvreが約1088年にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインレンスで生まれた時，父Etienne de Penthièvre Count of Treguier, 3rd Lord of Richmondは24歳，母Hawise Guincamp Countess of Guingampは25歳であった。1110年以前にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアでWalter De Gaunt Earl of Lincolnと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1135年4月21日にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメロウンで48歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアバードニーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Maud de Penthièvre(이)가 대략 1088년 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 렌스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Etienne de Penthièvre Count of Treguier, 3rd Lord of Richmond(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hawise Guincamp Countess of Guingamp(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1110년 이전 영국 링코실르에서 Walter De Gaunt Earl of Lincoln(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1135년 4월 21일 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 루언에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 바드니에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maud de Penthièvre nasceu aproximadamente 1088, em Rennes, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Etienne de Penthièvre Count of Treguier, 3rd Lord of Richmond, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Hawise Guincamp Countess of Guingamp, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Walter De Gaunt Earl of Lincoln antes 1110, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 21 de abril de 1135, em Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França, com 48 anos, e foi sepultada em Bardney, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud de Penthièvre родилась около 1088 г. в местности реннесь, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция, её отцу по имени Etienne de Penthièvre Count of Treguier, 3rd Lord of Richmond было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Hawise Guincamp Countess of Guingamp, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Walter De Gaunt Earl of Lincoln перед 1110 г. в местности линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 21 апреля 1135 г. в местности роуен, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция в возрасте 48 лет и была похоронена в местности бардни, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maud de Penthièvre nació aproximadamente 1088, en Rennes, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Etienne de Penthièvre Count of Treguier, 3rd Lord of Richmond, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Hawise Guincamp Countess of Guingamp, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Walter De Gaunt Earl of Lincoln antes de 1110, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 21 de abril de 1135, en Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultada en Bardney, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
